title: Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are in Beta ​
body:
**June 15, 2026**

Databricks Runtime 19 and Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.2.0.

For release notes, see [Databricks Runtime 19 (Beta)](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/19) and [Databricks Runtime 19 for Machine Learning (Beta)](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/19ml).
